# services.kbfs

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.kbfs`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.kbfs.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to mount the Keybase filesystem. |
| `services.kbfs.enableRedirector` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the Keybase root redirector service, allowing any user to access KBFS files via `/keybase`, which will show different contents depending on the requester. |
| `services.kbfs.extraFlags` | `list of string` | Additional flags to pass to the Keybase filesystem on launch. |
| `services.kbfs.mountPoint` | `string` | Mountpoint for the Keybase filesystem. |
